TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Salvador_Sánchez_Cerén, title = Salvador_Sánchez_Cerén, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salvador_Sánchez_Cerén} }

S.FORM: I 1944 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Salvador Sánchez Cerén, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no El salvador anini i ci Salvador Sánchez Cerén, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi saɾb~vaɬ~ɮo~ur s*nʦħə* ʦər*n, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u əɾ saɾb~vaɬ~ɮo~ur anini i ʦi saɾb~vaɬ~ɮo~ur s*nʦħə* ʦər*n, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: I 1944 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Salvador Sánchez Cerén, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no El salvador anini i ci Salvador Sánchez Cerén, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi saɾb~vaɬ~ɮo~ur s*nʦħə* ʦər*n, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u əɾ saɾb~vaɬ~ɮo~ur anini i ʦi saɾb~vaɬ~ɮo~ur s*nʦħə* ʦər*n, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
